title: Pan-Seared Drumsticks with Sous Vide Egg
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the juiciness of sous vide eggs with the crunch of pan-seared drumsticks.
instructions: Preheat the sous vide water bath to 145°F.
Season the drumsticks with salt and pepper.
Sous vide the eggs for 1 hour 15 minutes.
Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Pan-fry the drumsticks for 3-4 minutes per side, until golden brown.
Serve the pan-seared drumsticks with a sous vide egg and a pat of butter.
Optional: garnish with chopped herbs or chives.
